---
name: No AI attribution
description: User does not want any AI attribution or Co-Authored-By lines in commits
type: feedback
---

Do not include Co-Authored-By lines or any AI/Claude/Anthropic attribution in commit messages or source files.

**Why:** User preference — does not want AI traces in their repo.

**How to apply:** Never add Co-Authored-By, "generated by AI", or similar lines to commits, code comments, or files.
